title: chenopodium album var. pseudoborbasii
intro: Chenopodium album var. pseudoborbasii is a variant of the common lambsquarters plant, a type of annual or biennial plant belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Chenopodium album var. pseudoborbasii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
